checks.name: Linter/formatter config exists
checks.evidence: Both linter and formatter configs present: eslint.config.js (ESLint linter) and .prettierrc.mjs (Prettier formatter) at project root.

checks.name: Type safety indicators
checks.evidence: tsconfig.app.json has "strict": true plus noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, and noFallthroughCasesInSwitch all enabled.

checks.name: Consistent patterns within codebase
checks.evidence: Sampled 3 handler files: activitiesHandler.ts, contactsHandler.ts, notesHandler.ts. All share identical structure: JSDoc block header, same 3 import lines (react-admin, wrappers, callbacks), named create*Handler(baseProvider: DataProvider): DataProvider factory signature, and withErrorLogging(withLifecycleCallbacks(withSkipDelete(withValidation(baseProvider)), [...callbacks])) composition pattern.

checks.name: .gitignore present and reasonable
checks.evidence: .gitignore at project root covers: /node_modules (dependencies), dist/ and /build (build artifacts), .env and .env.* (environment files), .idea/ and .vscode/ (IDE files), .DS_Store and Thumbs.db (OS files), /coverage (test output), supabase/.env and supabase/functions/.env (edge function secrets), and .mcp.json (API keys).

checks.name: CLAUDE.md conventions actionable
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md contains 4 imperative-language matches (ALWAYS, NEVER, MUST, DO NOT) and 0 vague-language matches (prefer/try to/consider/should/might). Examples: 'NEVER OMIT', 'NEVER modify without explicit human approval', 'DO NOT' declarations, 'MUST' in engineering principles.

checks.name: Do-not-touch zones marked
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md lines 63-80 contain explicit 'Protected Zones (NEVER modify without explicit human approval)' section listing 6 specific paths: supabase/migrations/, supabase/functions/, src/atomic-crm/providers/supabase/composedDataProvider.ts, src/atomic-crm/providers/supabase/authProvider.ts, .claude/rules/, and CLAUDE.md itself. Additional 'Do Not Read' zone for src/types/database.generated.ts.

checks.name: MCP servers configured
checks.evidence: .mcp.json present at project root with full MCP configuration: MCP(supabase:*) permissions, mcp__supabase__execute_sql, mcp__supabase__list_tables, mcp__supabase__apply_migration, mcp__supabase__get_logs, mcp__supabase__generate_typescript_types, plus PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop hooks and enabledPlugins.
